title: Research Question Tree
description: Schema for the layered question tree produced during scope planning (Phase 10). Encodes the 7-layer investigation taxonomy (D-08/D-09) and the minimum-layer coverage invariant (D-16).

layers_populated.description: Layers that have at least one L1 node. Minimum of 3 enforces the layered-investigation invariant (D-16).

generation.description: Optional provenance for the bridge-question generation step (REL-09). Records which source was used and how many regenerate attempts occurred.

question.description: The research question text for this node.

layer.description: Which of the 7 investigation layers this question belongs to (D-08).

depth.description: Tree depth: 0 = root (research topic), 1 = layer children, 2-3 = sub-children.

branch_priority.description: Priority ranking within the tree (1 = highest). Guides crawl budget allocation.
